title: Airtable update fails due to unknown field name
symptom: When attempting to update a record in Airtable, n8n throws an error stating 'Unknown field name: "id"'. This prevents the workflow from completing successfully.
not_this_if: The field 'id' exists in the Airtable table
root_cause: The error occurs because the Airtable table does not contain a field named 'id'. When n8n tries to update a record using this field, it results in a 422 error indicating that the request is invalid due to the unknown field.
fix_steps: Add 'id' to the ignore fields list
agent_instruction: Add 'id' to the ignore fields list in the Airtable node settings and save the workflow.
